message:
Error: nu::shell::error

  x These are not equal.
   tests.nu:4:14]
 3 | assert equal (two_fer "Alice") "One for Alice, one for me."
 4 | assert equal (two_fer) "One for you, one for me."
   :              ^^^^|^^^^ ^^^^^^^^^^^^^|^^^^^^^^^^^^
   :                  |                  `-- right: "One for you, one for me."
   :                  `-- left: "One for foo, one for me."
   `----
